hero.title: Digital Knowledge Base for Kelurahan Tingkir Lor
hero.desc: A digital ecosystem for Family Medicinal Plants (TOGA) built from a cross-disciplinary collaboration by the KKN team of Diponegoro University to empower Tingkir Lor residents in herbal self-reliance and botanical knowledge integration.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: List of registered users in the TOGA Berdaya system with different access permission levels.

monitoring.title: Under Development
monitoring.subtitle: The KKN agenda monitoring feature is currently being prepared for you.

audit.title: Self-Audit & TOGA Control Card
audit.subtitle: Self-monitoring instrument for liquid organic fertilizer (POC) production management and medicinal plant care at home.
audit.pic: Project Officer: Rizal Krisnadhi - Tax Accounting UNDIP 2026
audit.checklist_desc: Check each operational step that you have routinely carried out at home.

indicators.0: Organic kitchen waste is chopped into small pieces before putting it into the container.
indicators.1: 20-25% headspace is available in the fermentation container for gas.
indicators.2: Container is shaken periodically during the first week.
indicators.3: Harvested liquid organic fertilizer (POC) smells fresh and acidic (similar to fermented cassava/tape aroma).
indicators.4: Watered with a liquid organic fertilizer (POC) solution mixture regularly once every 1-2 weeks.
indicators.5: Watering is done at the optimal time (Morning 06:00-09:00 / Afternoon 16:00-18:00).

calc.title: TOGA Pricing Calculator
calc.subtitle: Cost-Plus Pricing method for establishing TOGA selling prices.
